metadata.description: DB enrichment data for batch 3 AI analysis
metadata.client_description: Private foundation operating adaptive sailing program for disabled veterans, SF Bay Area

366152744.name: Kovler Family Foundation
366152744.app_restrictions: No Restrictions. Typical Grant Awarded is between $1,000 - $5,000
366152744.application_info: Submit 1-2 page written proposal + IRS determination letter. Deadline: mid-November. Contact: 875 N Michigan Ave, Suite 3400, Chicago, IL 60611. Phone: 312-664-5050
366152744.source: multi-peer (funds Judd Goldman Adaptive Sailing, has CA grants)
366152744.no_website_note: No foundation website exists. Analysis based on DB data + application info from GrantStation/Instrumentl profiles.

237376427.name: Helen V Brach Foundation
237376427.app_restrictions: Must be organization exempt under Sect 501c3

key_grants.purpose: programs for residents with intellectual and developmental disabilities
Youth Institute for youth with disabilities
train canine companions for people with disabilities
programming for people with disabilities through therapeutic riding
furnish home interiors for veterans emerging from homelessness
Helping Dogs, Helping Heroes Program, free to all military veterans
Military Family Programs to lift spirits of Illinois military families

237376427.source: high-affinity-CA (108 disability grants, 42 CA grants, 3 confirmed PF recipients)

330247161.name: Crail-Johnson Foundation

key_grants.purpose: support military service members, spouses, children
care for individuals with intellectual and developmental disabilities

330247161.source: high-affinity-CA (594 CA grants, 19 disability grants, active grantmaker)

946079493.name: William G Gilmore Foundation

key_grants.recipient: Swords to Plowshares Veterans Rights Org
key_grants.purpose: drop-in supportive services for veterans experiencing homelessness
legal assistance to low-income disabled adults
afterschool program for children and teens with disabilities

946079493.source: high-affinity-CA (400 CA grants, funds Swords to Plowshares + Waterside Workshops)

870757807.name: Kim & Harold Louie Family Foundation
870757807.website_discovery_notes: Website has grants for organizations page. Founded by Betty B. Louie in honor of her parents. EXPLICITLY gives 'special consideration to all military members and their families' because founder's father was WWII veteran.

key_grants.purpose: support wounded/disabled veterans and their families
physical and psychological rehab for wounded veterans
comfortable homes for veterans and their families

870757807.source: high-affinity-CA (27 veteran grants, 62 CA grants, explicit military preference on website)

911722000.name: Lucky Seven Foundation

key_grants.recipient: NW School of Wooden Boat Building
Friends of American Lake Veterans Golf Course

911722000.source: high-affinity-CA (177 CA grants, funds Wake for Warriors, Sail Sand Point, wooden boat school, adaptive riding)

367041179.name: Howard Family Foundation
367041179.application_info: Bank-managed trust. Contact: CIBC, 100 Federal St, 37th Floor, Boston, MA 02110. Jason Danz (Associate Manager). Open to new applicants per Grantable.co (12% funding rate).
367041179.source: multi-peer (5+ consecutive years funding Judd Goldman Adaptive Sailing + Columbia Sailing School + Wounded Warrior)
367041179.no_website_note: Bank-managed trust via CIBC National Trust Company. No foundation website. The howardfamilyfoundation.org website belongs to a DIFFERENT entity in Punta Gorda, FL.

650171539.name: Lennar Foundation

key_grants.purpose: services for adults with intellectual and developmental disabilities
therapeutic horseback riding for children and adults with disabilities
sports dreams for kids with disabilities

650171539.source: high-affinity-CA ($985K veteran grants, $802K disability grants, $2.25M to PF recipients)

236261726.name: Cigna Foundation

key_grants.recipient: A Sanctuary for Military Families Inc
Iraq and Afghanistan Veterans of America

236261726.source: multi-peer (42 vet grants, 17 confirmed PF recipients, BORP adaptive sports funder)

756038519.name: Texas Instruments Foundation

key_grants.recipient: National Sports Center for the Disabled

756038519.source: multi-peer (employee matching gifts program, 10 PF recipients, 1112 CA grants)
756038519.note: Primarily an employee matching gifts program. Small individual grants ($1K-$5K). VetsBoats would need a TI employee connection.

810465899.name: First Interstate BancSystem Foundation
810465899.app_restrictions: grants intended to serve communities of interest to First Interstate Bank
810465899.source: multi-peer (21 PF recipients, funds Montana Warriors on the Water, Oregon Adaptive Sports)
810465899.note: Bank foundation serving MT/OR/WA/WY communities. Very limited CA presence (5 grants). Geographic restriction risk.

364267581.name: The Kellcie Fund
364267581.app_restrictions: THE ORGANIZATION MUST BE QUALIFIED UNDER IRC SEC 170(C).
364267581.application_info: No deadline. Submit a letter. Contact: 227 W Monroe St, Suite 3750, Chicago, IL 60606. Phone: (847) 328-2383

key_grants.recipient: Chicago Fund on Aging and Disability

364267581.source: multi-peer (funds Judd Goldman, Lehman family philanthropic network)
364267581.no_website_note: No foundation website. Very small grants ($500 typical). Part of Lehman family network (New Prospect Foundation, Menemsha Family Fund).
